creator: steve@havk.org
text:
On Mon, Feb 26, 2001 at 10:54:09AM +0800, Clive Lin wrote:
> On Sun, Feb 25, 2001 at 06:37:48PM -0800, steve@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> > Synopsis: vide-0.2.6 port update to the vide-0.5
> > 
> > State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> > State-Changed-By: steve
> > State-Changed-When: Sun Feb 25 18:37:22 PST 2001
> > State-Changed-Why: 
> > I'll be committing these changes along with ports/25293 shortly.
> 
> Uhmmm, please hold a second. The original shar archive isn't fully
> correct. It missed a dependency, and more important, a maintainership
> take over. Though the original maintainer seems not very responsive, I
> still like to wait for timed-out ...

I wasn't going to change the maintainer and I already fixed the
diffs so that they actually worked. :)

> BTW, the diff attached is the correct one, if you still like to commit
> it ...

Thanks.  I'll review your patch shortly to see if I've missed anything.

-Steve
